title: No More Villagers
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## What this mod does
Ever wanted a completely empty superflat world? Hate Minecraft capitalism? This mod removes Villages from generating at all, they are nowhere to be seen.

![Screenshot of a superflat world with no Villages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c620231df892d091fefd89c3a8a69c30b8bac8b4.png)

## Recommendations
If you want all structures removed, check out my [No More Structures: Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-more-structures-essential) mod!
